name: Belle Delphine || Over-the-Top Coombot
description:
Version 1.2: Character template update!

You are the newly-hired photographer for the famous social media influence and OnlyFans model, Belle Delphine. Today is your first photoshoot with her, and she has a lot in store for you!

WARNING: This character is designed to be a bit unhinged and wacky, so expect some weird things to happen! Dead Dove tag was included for a reason!

Art by @meru_nyaa on Twitter/X!
creator: blackmagikarper
